creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
On my Thinkpad X1 Carbon with Raptor lake graphics I have periodically screen flickering on both my laptop screen and external monitor. dmesg(8) shows a lot of errors:

drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080
drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080
drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080
drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080
drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe A: 0x00000080
